maay_maay.build_an_equivalent_ratio_family: Dhis qoys saami u rigma ah
maay_maay.set_one_aligned_interval: Dhig hal u rexeeye oo la barbar rigay
maay_maay.top_line_value_per_interval: Qiimaha xariiqda sare ee u rexeeye kasta
maay_maay.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Qiimaha xariiqda hoose ee u rexeeye kasta
maay_maay.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: 1 unit oo xariiqda sare wuxuu u rigmaa
maay_maay.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: u rexeeye kasta, xariiqda hoosena wahay ku kortaa
maay_maay.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Geli qiyaas ka weyn eber labada doorasho.
maay_maay.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Labada doorasho wahay leeyihiin cost per unit isku mid ah.
maay_maay.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A wuxuu leeyahay cost per unit ka hooseeya.
maay_maay.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B wuxuu leeyahay cost per unit ka hooseeya.
maay_maay.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Hagaaji qiimayaasha si labada unit rates ay ugu jiraan learning-model range.
maay_maay.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Isbarbarrig cadaalad ah wuxuu u qeybiyaa cost kasta tiradiisa gaarka ah. Macnuhu wuxuu sidoo kale ku lug yeelan karaa tayada, khasaaraha, ama baahiyaha kale.
maay_maay.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Tusaalahani wuxuu ka sarreeyaa xadka 1000% ee learning model. Hagaaji qaybta ama ranka.
maay_maay.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Natiijadani wahay ka sarreysaa xadka tirada 1,000,000. Hagaaji qiimayaasha tusaalaha.
maay_maay.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Boqolkiiba lama qeexo marki ranku yahay eber. Geli ran togan si aad u dhisto cajaladda.
maay_maay.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Ranka lama qeexo marki boqolkiibu yahay eber. Geli boqolkiiba togan si aad u dhisto cajaladda.
maay_maay.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Toban qayb oo siman, mid kastaa wuxuu matalaa 10% ran qudha.
maay_maay.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Qayb kasta oo la xariiqay wa saxda ah 10% ran qudha. Qayb qayb ahaan buuxsantay wahay muujinaysaa jajabka saxda ah ee 10% taas.
maay_maay.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Geli ugu yaraan laba lammaane oo isku-duwid ah oo sax ah, oo ay ku jirto mid qiimaha x-diisu aanu eber ahayn.
maay_maay.proportional_the_unit_rate_is_constant: Saami ahaan: unit rate wa joogto.
maay_maay.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Saami ma aha: caddaymuhu ma muujinayaan hal unit rate joogto ah oo maraya isha.
maay_maay.load_non_proportional: Soo raar xaalad aan saami ahayn
maay_maay.x_values_comma_separated_2: Qiimayaasha x, comma lagu kala saaray
maay_maay.y_values_comma_separated_2: Qiimayaasha y, comma lagu kala saaray
maay_maay.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Isticmaal tiro isku mid ah oo qiimayaasha x iyo y. Garaafkan rubuca koowad wuxuu u baahan yahay tiro aan taban ahayn saf kasta.
maay_maay.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Hagaaji liiska isku-duwidda kahoore intaadan go'aan ka gaadhin saamiyada:
maay_maay.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Caddayn ka timid shaxda iyo unit rate
maay_maay.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Welli ma jiraan safaf lammaane ah oo sax ah.
maay_maay.plotted_table_points: ribco shax ah ayaa la sawiray.
maay_maay.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Fallaadh model saami ah ayaa la kordhiyay iyada oo isha soo marta.
maay_maay.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Ma jiro set ribco oo ramaystiran oo la heli karo si loo sawiro garaafka.
maay_maay.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Caddaynta shaxda: dhammaan qiimayaasha y ÷ x ee la qeexay wahay la mid yihiin
maay_maay.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: ribcaha la geliyay wahaa ka mid ah (0,0) wahayna raacaan fallaadhda model.
maay_maay.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: fallaadhda model wahay kordhisaa xidhiidhka joogtada ah iyada oo (0,0) soo marta, xitaa haddii isha aan la gelin.
maay_maay.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Hubi haddii ay jiraan qiimayaal y ÷ x oo isbeddelaya, qiime y oo aan eber ahayn marki x = 0, ama ribco aan ku yaal hal xariiq toosan oo isha soo marta.
maay_maay.move_between_representations_and_expla: U dhaqaaq inta u rexeysa representations oo sharax xidhiidhka isku-rufashada.
maay_maay.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Ugu wanaagsan isbarbarrig cadaalad ah maxaa yeelay xaalad kastaa wahaa dib loogu qoraa unit kasta.
maay_maay.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Saami lagu cabbiray ran 100; isticmaal qayb = boqolkiiba × ran.
maay_maay.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Xariiq toosan oo isha soo marta wahay muujinaysaa hal multiplier joogto ah oo laga bilaabo x ilaa y.
maay_maay.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Marki hoore qiyaas, ilaali units, oo isweydii haddii labada tiro ay isku-rufasho ku beddeleen.
